text:
@function sassyParseGutter($gutter)
  $gt: 0px !default
  $gr: 0px !default
  $gb: 0px !default
  $gl: 0px !default
  @if type-of($gutter) == "list"
    @if length($gutter) == 2
      $gt: nth($gutter, 1) / 2
      $gr: nth($gutter, 2) / 2
      $gb: $gt
      $gl: $gr
    @else if length($gutter) == 4
      $gt: nth($gutter, 1) / 2
      $gr: nth($gutter, 2) / 2
      $gb: nth($gutter, 3) / 2
      $gl: nth($gutter, 4) / 2
  @else if $gutter == true
    $gt: $sgv / 2
    $gr: $sgh / 2
    $gb: $gt
    $gl: $gr
  @else if $gutter == false
  @else
    $gt: $gutter / 2
    $gr: $gt
    $gb: $gt
    $gl: $gt
  @return (gt: $gt, gr: $gr, gb: $gb, gl: $gt)

@function sassyParseGutter($gutter)
  $gt: 0px !default
  $gr: 0px !default
  $gb: 0px !default
  $gl: 0px !default
  @if type-of($gutter) == "list"
    @if length($gutter) == 2
      $gt: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 1), $sgv) / 2
      $gr: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 2), $sgh) / 2
      $gb: $gt
      $gl: $gr
    @else if length($gutter) == 4
      $gt: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 1), $sgv) / 2
      $gr: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 2), $sgh) / 2
      $gb: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 3), $sgv) / 2
      $gl: sassyAutoGutterFallback(nth($gutter, 4), $sgh) / 2
  @else if $gutter == true or $gutter == auto
    $gt: $sgv / 2
    $gr: $sgh / 2
    $gb: $gt
    $gl: $gr
  @else if $gutter == false
  @else
    $gt: sassyAutoGutterFallback($gutter, $sgv) / 2
    $gr: $gt
    $gb: $gt
    $gl: $gt

  @return (gt: $gt, gr: $gr, gb: $gb, gl: $gl)

=z-animate($animation: theSlowArcofTime, $start-x: 10, $start-y: 0, $end-x: 1000, $end-y: 400, $duration: 100s)
  animation: $animation $duration cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite
  animation-direction: alternate
  -webkit-animation: theSlowArcofTime $duration cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite
  -webkit-animation-direction: alternate
  @keyframes theSlowArcofTime
    from
      +z-position($z-index: 4px, $x-position: (($start-x) + px), $y-position: (($start-y) + px), $shadow: true)
    to
      +z-position($z-index: 4px, $x-position: (($end-x) + px), $y-position: (($end-y) + px), $shadow: true)
  @-webkit-keyframes theSlowArcofTime
    from
      +z-position($z-index: 4px, $x-position: (($start-x) + px), $y-position: (($start-y) + px), $shadow: true)
    to
      +z-position($z-index: 4px, $x-position: (($end-x) + px), $y-position: (($end-y) + px), $shadow: true)

=moveShadow($name, $from, $to, $spacingX, $spacingY, $delay, $duration, $options)
    +shadow($from, $spacingX, $spacingY)
    &::after
        animation: $name $duration ease-in-out forwards $options
        animation-delay: $delay
    @keyframes #{$name}
        from
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            transform: translateX($from*$spacingX) translateY($from*$spacingY) translateZ(-$from)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $from/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($from/10)
        to
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            transform: translateX($to*$spacingX) translateY($to*$spacingY) translateZ(-$to)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $to/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($to/10)

=moveShadow($name, $from, $to, $decalX, $decalY, $delay, $duration)
    +shadow($from, $decalX, $decalY)
    &::after
        animation: $name $duration ease-in-out forwards
        animation-delay: $delay
        border-radius: inherit
    @keyframes #{$name}
        from
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$from/10))
            transform: translateX($from*$decalX) translateY($from*$decalY) translateZ(-$from)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $from/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($from/10)
        to
            background: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            border-color: rgba(black, .2 / (1+$to/10))
            transform: translateX($to*$decalX) translateY($to*$decalY) translateZ(-$to)
            box-shadow: 0 0 $to/10 rgba(black, .2)
            filter: blur($to/10)

=chair
    position: absolute
    top: 0
    width: $size
    height: $size
    > *
        top: $size*.5
        left: $size*.5
    > .foot
        +tile($size*.45, $size*.1, 3px, $furniture-color0)
        transform-origin: 0% 50%
    @for $i from 0 through 4
        > .foot:nth-child(#{2+$i})
            transform: translateZ(4px) rotateZ(360deg * $i / 5)
    > .pod
        +cube($size*.07, $size*.07, $size*.6, $furniture-color0)
        > *
            border-color: $furniture-color0
        > .seat
            +tile($size*.7, $size*.7, 3px, $chair-color)
            top: -$size*.35
            left: -$size*.35
            &, &::before
                border-radius: $size*.2

=character
    position: absolute
    top: 0
    +plane($size*.8, $size*1.2, $character-color)
    border-radius: $size*.5 $size*.5 0 0
    transform: translateZ($size) rotateX(-90deg)
    > .head
        +plane($size*.7, $size*.7, $character-color)
        top: -$size*.7
        border-radius: 50%
    > .leg
        +plane($size*.25, $size*.4, $character-color)
        top: $size*1.2
        left: $size*.1
        +animation(rightLeg, height, $size*.4, $size*.25, 0, .5s, alternate infinite)
        &:last-child
            left: $size*.45
            +animation(leftLeg, height, $size*.4, $size*.25, .5s, .5s, alternate infinite)

=cabinet
	position: absolute
	top: 0
	+cube($size*.6, $size*.8, $size*.8, $furniture-color0)
	> *:nth-child(2)
		background: transparent
		border-style: solid
		border-color: $furniture-color0
		border-width: $size*.05 $size*.025 $size*.05 $size*.025
	.tray
		+tile($size*.55, $size*.8, 2px, $furniture-color0)
		@for $i from 0 through 2
			&:nth-child(#{1+$i})
				transform: translateZ($size * .30 + $i * $size * .25)
				.drawer
					+cube($size*.55, $size*.8, $size*.18, $furniture-color1)
					+shadow($size * .30 + $i * $size * .25 - 1rem, 0, 0)
					transform: translateZ(-$size * .23)
					> *:first-child
						background-color: transparent

=desk
	position: absolute
	top: 0
	width: $size*2
	height: $size*3
	> *
		transform: translateZ($size)
		&:nth-child(1)
			+tile($size*2, $size, 3px, lightgrey)
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 20px 10px 10px 0
			.table-pod
				&:first-child
					transform: translateX($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(2)
					transform: translateX(-$size*.4) translateY($size*.1) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(3)
					transform: translateX($size*.1) translateY(-$size*.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)
		&:nth-child(2)
			+tile($size, $size*2, 3px, lightgrey)
			top: $size
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px
			.table-pod
				transform: translateY($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)

@keyframes bounceInDown
  0%, 60%, 75%, 90%, 100%
    -webkit-transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1)
    transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1)

  0%
    opacity: 0
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, -3000px, 0)
    -ms-transform: translate3d(0, -3000px, 0)
    transform: translate3d(0, -3000px, 0)

  60%
    opacity: 1
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 25px, 0)
    -ms-transform: translate3d(0, 25px, 0)
    transform: translate3d(0, 25px, 0)

  75%
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, -10px, 0)
    -ms-transform: translate3d(0, -10px, 0)
    transform: translate3d(0, -10px, 0)

  90%
    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 5px, 0)
    -ms-transform: translate3d(0, 5px, 0)
    transform: translate3d(0, 5px, 0)

  100%
    -webkit-transform: none
    -ms-transform: none
    transform: none

@keyframes zoomOutLeft
  40%
    opacity: 1
    -webkit-transform: scale3d(0.475, 0.475, 0.475) translate3d(42px, 0, 0)
    -ms-transform: scale3d(0.475, 0.475, 0.475) translate3d(42px, 0, 0)
    transform: scale3d(0.475, 0.475, 0.475) translate3d(42px, 0, 0)

  100%
    opacity: 0
    -webkit-transform: scale(0.1) translate3d(-2000px, 0, 0)
    -ms-transform: scale(0.1) translate3d(-2000px, 0, 0)
    transform: scale(0.1) translate3d(-2000px, 0, 0)
    -webkit-transform-origin: left center
    -ms-transform-origin: left center
    transform-origin: left center
